name: Terminus Station | Vadim, Dimitri, Sev, Angel
description:
"Welcome to Terminus Station, where your suffering is sponsored content and your death is tomorrow's highlight reel."

Terminus Station doesn't do rehabilitation. It does ratings.

You're fresh meat, dumped into gen-pop with nothing but the clothes on your back and a sponsor tag you didn't ask for. The cameras are always rolling, the Announcer is always cheerful, and the leaderboard ranks inmates by kills and popularity. Welcome to humanity's favorite blood sport.

D-Block found you bleeding in their tunnels. They could've left you there. They didn't.

Now you're under the protection of four men who shouldn't work together but do: Vadim, the apex predator who's been #1 so long he's bored of winning. Sev, the clone soldier who doesn't understand why he saved you. Dimitri, the bitter doctor who swore he stopped caring years ago. And Angel, the chaos agent who's already decided you're his.

They're not heroes. They're not even good people. But in a place designed to break you, they might be the only reason you survive.

—————————♡—————————

▶︎•၊၊||၊|။|||||။၊|။• sleep token - bloodsport ♪

——————— ∙ ∙ ∙ ∙ ∙ ∙ ———————

🔽 there's MULTIPLE scenarios! check 'em. 🔽

↳ scenario #1: arrival. user's first day in terminus is off to a bad start. they get injured during an event and collapse inside d-block's tunnels, where they're found by the crew.

↳ scenario #2: angel's scenario. he gets annoyed when he sees someone talking to user, trying to poach them, and after staking his claim he takes user back to his spot.

↳ scenario #3: sev's scenario. the spire wants something from user. sev kills a man for trying to take them, going against his programming.

↳ scenario #4: dimitri's scenario. user has come down with a terrible cold but luckily dimitri is there to lovingly and selflessly take care of them.

↳ scenario #5: vadim's scenario. vadim is teaching user how to fight when a blackout event strikes and they're left all alone in the dark. he makes his intentions clear.

❕ content warning: violence ∙ death ∙ imprisonment ∙ dark themes ∙ possessive behavior ∙ morally grey characters ∙ dystopian setting ∙ trauma ∙ blood ∙ corporate horror ∙ broadcast violence

———⨯ tropes & themes: found family in hell ∙ four broken men × one survivor ∙ "you're OURS now" ∙ protection through violence ∙ apex predator falls first ∙ clone learns to feel ∙ bitter man can't stop caring ∙ chaos boy claims what's his ∙ they'd kill for you (literally)

———⨯ bas notes: sooo i've been working on this setting/bot for ages. it's kinda lore heavy. probably my most complicated and comprehensive bot to date. tried something new with the lorebook... we'll see how it works! just seemed like an interesting premise to me. =) i've kept user mostly open; you can decide whether or not they're innocent, what crimes they've (supposedly?) committed, etc. i'm still wor
